titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 115: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 115. (A.R. No. B 56 of 1918.) VṚIDDHĀCHALAM, VRIDDHACHALAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, Vṛiddhagirīśvara temple.

The wording of the inscription is not clear at the end. It records a gift of 45 sheep for half-a-lamp to be burnt before the image of Sūryadēva in the temple at Tirumudukuṉṟam by Kāvidikkuḍi Kulamāṉaṉ Kūttaṉ of Neṟkuppai in Paruvūr- kūṟṟam, a sub-division of Iruṅgōḷappāḍi. It also registers a gift of one mā of dry land by the same donor for the daily supply of an uḻakku of ghee to the temple and some other articles such as copper pot, and other vessels for burning another lamp.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX. No. 303.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripatmamaṟ(k)ku yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu Iruṅ koḷappāṭip paruvūrkkū
ṟṟattu neṟkkuppaiyuṭaiyāṉ kāvitikkuṭik kuṭikkulamāṉaṉ kūttan tirumutukuṉṟattu sūryya
devaṟkku vaitta viḷakku Arai viḷakku Āṭu 4 10 5 candrādittavar panmāheśvararakṣai .
Ivaṉe kulamāṉaṉ kuttaṉRead�vaitta Aṉtoḷakattaṇṭum piṭāyum kaṭikaiyūm
Itu koṭu poyeṟiṉār niccam Uḻakku ney yaṭṭuvatākavum ceppu kalacappāṉai
niṟai Aimpatiṉ(m) palam Aḻivu cola puṉcey Oru mānilam candrādittavaṟ .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
